title: Chambre de commerce, d'industrie et des services de Genève

title: Building a Safer Society through Science and Technology: A Compendium of Korea’s Science and Technology-based Disaster Management
content: This casebook highlights the implementation of science and technology-based disaster management, featuring 24 Korean practices across four thematic areas, along with Korea's success factors and remaining challenges. It is available in English and Korean.

title: Deep learning completes US flood hazard maps revealing millions exposed to previously unrecognized risk

title: How UNDRR is helping Syria lay the foundation for a resilient future

title: Predicting hydrological drought at global scale: an analysis of the CEMS seasonal forecasts
